name: CVRC Miami Pickleball
description: CVRC Miami Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Miami, AZ. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and lights.
fees: Fee required — $5 day fee or members monthly fee.  Courts open Monday through Sunday  CVRC hours

name: Rumsey Park
description: Rumsey Park is a place to play pickleball in Payson, AZ. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.
